texts:
﻿Fittbot Subscription Plans Training Data
Plan Overview
Fittbot offers three subscription tiers: Gold, Platinum, and Diamond, each with different durations and feature sets.
Gold Plan (1 Month)
* Duration: 1 Month
* Monthly Price: ₹199
* Total Cost: ₹199
* Discount: 50% off original price (₹398)
* Daily Cost: ₹6.6 per day
Gold Plan Features
* AI Coach (KyraAI): Yes
* Diet Image Uploads: Limited to 15 per day
* Macro Tracking: Yes (Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fiber, Sugar)
* Water Intake Tracker: Yes
* AI Food Detection: Yes
* AI Personalized Plans: Advanced AI level only
* AI Reports & Insights: Yes
* Community Feed: Yes
* Gym Buddy (Social & Fitness Match): Yes
* Live Gym Stats: Yes
* Nutrition Consultation: Not included
* Customer Support: Yes
Platinum Plan (6 Months)
* Duration: 6 Months
* Monthly Price: ₹179
* Total Cost: ₹1,074 (₹179 × 6)
* Discount: 55% off
* Daily Cost: ₹5.9 per day
Platinum Plan Features
* AI Coach (KyraAI): Yes
* Diet Image Uploads: Unlimited
* Macro Tracking: Yes (Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fiber, Sugar)
* Water Intake Tracker: Yes
* AI Food Detection: Yes
* AI Personalized Plans: Advanced AI + Progress Reports
* AI Reports & Insights: Yes
* Community Feed: Yes
* Gym Buddy (Social & Fitness Match): Yes
* Live Gym Stats: Yes
* Nutrition Consultation: 1 Session included
* Customer Support: Yes
Diamond Plan (1 Year) - Most Popular
* Duration: 12 Months
* Monthly Price: ₹159
* Total Cost: ₹1,908 (₹159 × 12)
* Discount: 60% off

* Daily Cost: ₹5.2 per day
* Status: Power Pack / Most Popular option
Diamond Plan Features
* AI Coach (KyraAI): Yes
* Diet Image Uploads: Unlimited
* Macro Tracking: Yes (Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fiber, Sugar)
* Water Intake Tracker: Yes
* AI Food Detection: Yes
* AI Personalized Plans: Advanced AI + Progress Reports
* AI Reports & Insights: Yes
* Community Feed: Yes
* Gym Buddy (Social & Fitness Match): Yes
* Live Gym Stats: Yes
* Nutrition Consultation: 2 Sessions included
* Customer Support: Yes
Pricing Breakdown
Gold Plan
* Monthly Rate: ₹199
* Original Price: ₹398
* Savings: 50%
* Best for: Short-term trial users
Platinum Plan
* Monthly Rate: ₹179
* Total Cost: ₹1,074
* Savings: 55%
* Best for: Medium-term commitment users
Diamond Plan
* Monthly Rate: ₹159 (lowest)
* Total Cost: ₹1,908
* Savings: 60% (highest)
* Best for: Long-term committed users
* Status: Most popular choice
Key Differentiators
Diet Image Uploads
* Gold: Limited (15 per day)
* Platinum & Diamond: Unlimited
AI Personalized Plans
* Gold: Basic Advanced AI
* Platinum & Diamond: Advanced AI with Progress Reports
Nutrition Consultation
* Gold: Not available
* Platinum: 1 consultation session
* Diamond: 2 consultation sessions
Value Proposition
* Diamond offers best monthly rate and highest discount
* Platinum provides good balance of features and commitment
* Gold suitable for users wanting to test the service

﻿Fittbot Fitness App – Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)-User’s
Q. Is there a free trial?
A. Yes, Fittbot offers a trial period for new users to explore its features before committing to a paid plan. The duration of the trial may vary based on promotional offers.
Q. Can I choose a monthly subscription plan?
A. Yes, Fittbot offers flexible subscription plans, including both monthly, Quarterly, Half-yearly and yearly options, to cater to different user needs.
Q: How do I pay using a UPI or QR code on Fittbot?
1. To pay using UPI or QR code, follow these steps:
1. Select your desired plan or product on Fittbot.
2. Choose UPI/QR Code as the payment method at checkout.
3. If using UPI, enter your UPI ID and approve the payment through your UPI app.
4. If using a QR code, scan the code displayed on the screen using any UPI-supported app and complete the payment.
5. Once the payment is successful, you will receive a confirmation message, and your subscription or purchase will be activated.
For any payment-related issues, please contact support@fittbot.com
Q.  How do I pay with a credit or debit card on Fittbot?
A. You can pay using a credit or debit card by selecting the payment option at checkout, entering your card details, and following the on-screen instructions. All transactions are securely processed.
Q.  Can I use online banking to make payments on Fittbot?

A. Yes, Fittbot supports online Banking as a payment method. Simply select Internet Banking at checkout and follow the secure payment gateway process.
Q.  Is it secure to use my credit or debit card on Fittbot?
A. Absolutely! Fittbot uses secure payment gateways that comply with industry security standards to ensure safe transactions.
Q.  What measures does Fittbot take to prevent card fraud?
A. Fittbot implements multiple security measures, including encryption, OTP verification, and fraud detection systems, to prevent unauthorized transactions.
Q. Are there any hidden fees when making a payment on Fittbot?
A. No, there are no hidden charges. The total payable amount is always displayed before you confirm your transaction.
Q: My transaction didn't go through, but the money was still deducted from my account. What should I do?
A. If your transaction fails and the amount is deducted, please contact us at support@fittbot.com within 24 hours. Our team will coordinate with the payment provider to resolve the issue and ensure a refund is processed promptly.
Q. Do I need to create an account to buy products on Fittbot?
A. Yes, creating an account provides a personalized experience, access to fitness plans, and secure transaction history.
Q. Is my password secure?

A. Yes, Fittbot uses industry-standard encryption protocols to protect user passwords. We recommend setting a strong, unique password and enabling two-factor authentication.
Q. How secure is my data?
A. Fittbot prioritizes user data security with advanced encryption and strict privacy policies. Your data is securely stored and protected against unauthorized access.
Q. How does Fittbot’s external QR code help track workouts?
A. Fittbot’s unique QR code system allows users to scan equipment, automatically log workouts, and track reps, weights, and calories burned. This ensures precise and accurate fitness data.
Q: Can the Fittbot Fitness Smartwatch provide exact data, and can it be used for medical purposes?
A. The Fittbot Fitness Smartwatch is designed for personal fitness tracking and provides reliable fitness data. However, it is not intended for medical purposes and should not be used as a substitute for medical devices or advice.
Q: Can I chat with my gym Trainers? Is there a specific community page available?
1. Yes, Fittbot provides a built-in chat feature that allows gym clients to communicate directly with their trainers. Additionally, a Community Page is available where gym members and trainers can engage, share fitness updates, and participate in discussions.
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) - Gym Buddies Feature
1. What is the Gym Buddies feature?

Gym Buddies is a feature that allows you to connect with like-minded fitness enthusiasts, find workout partners, and stay motivated by working out together. It helps you build a supportive fitness community.
2. How do I find a Gym Buddy?
You can find a Gym Buddy by searching for users with similar fitness goals and workout schedules. Use filters to match with people based on preferences like training style, fitness level, and availability.
3. Is the Gym Buddies feature free to use?
Yes, the Gym Buddies feature is free to use. However, there may be premium features available for enhanced matching, priority connections, and advanced filtering options.
4. How do I connect with a Gym Buddy?
Once you find a suitable match, you can send a connection request. Once accepted, you can chat, schedule workouts, and share fitness tips with your Gym Buddy.
5. Can I invite my friends to join Gym Buddies?
Yes! You can invite friends to join Gym Buddies and work out together. The feature also allows you to sync with your contacts and social networks to find friends already using the platform.
6. Is my personal information safe?
Absolutely. We prioritize user privacy and security. Your personal details are only shared with Gym Buddies you approve. You can also manage your privacy settings in the app.
7. What if I want to change my Gym Buddy?

You can always explore new connections and update your Gym Buddies list. If a Gym Buddy is inactive or does not match your workout style, you can remove the connection and find new partners.
8. Can I block or report a Gym Buddy?
Yes, if you encounter any inappropriate behavior, you can report or block a user from your Gym Buddies list. Our support team will review and take necessary action.
9. Does Gym Buddies support group workouts?
Yes! You can form workout groups with multiple Gym Buddies to train together, join fitness challenges, and participate in group activities.
10. How do I get the best match for a Gym Buddy?
To improve your matches, keep your profile updated with accurate fitness goals, workout schedules, and preferences. Engage with the community, join discussions, and participate in challenges to connect with more like-minded individuals.
11. How do I provide feedback about the Gym Buddies feature?
We welcome your feedback! You can share your thoughts through the app’s feedback section or contact our support team. Your input helps us improve and enhance your experience.
Need further assistance? Contact our support team at support@fittbot.com.
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) - Nutritionist Support
1. What is the Nutritionist Support feature?

Nutritionist Support connects you with professional nutritionists who can provide personalized diet plans, meal recommendations, and guidance tailored to your fitness goals and dietary needs.
2. How do I access Nutritionist Support?
You can access Nutritionist Support through the app by selecting the ‘Nutrition’ section.
3. Is Nutritionist Support free to use?
Basic nutrition tips and resources are available for free. However, personalized consultations and advanced nutrition plans may require a premium subscription or one-time payment.
4. Can I speak with a nutritionist directly?
Yes, you can schedule one-on-one consultations with certified nutritionists. You can communicate through chat, video calls, or in-app messaging.
5. Can I get a customized meal plan?
Yes! Nutritionists can create personalized meal plans based on your health goals, dietary restrictions, and food preferences.
6. How often can I consult a nutritionist?
It depends on your subscription or consultation package. Some plans offer unlimited chat support, while others allow for scheduled sessions.
7. Is my health data secure?
Yes, we prioritize user privacy. Your health data and consultations remain confidential and are only accessible by you and your assigned nutritionist.
Fittbot Fitness App – Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)-Gym’s
Q: Is the Fittbot Gym Admin App free, or do I need to pay a subscription fee?

A. Great news! 🎉 The Fittbot Gym Admin App comes with a Lifetime Free Membership! 🚀 No hidden charges, no monthly fees—just powerful gym management features at your fingertips, absolutely free! Manage your gym effortlessly and focus on what truly matters—helping your members achieve their fitness goals! 💪🔥
Q: Do I need to create a Gym Admin account to access the Fittbot App?
A. Yes, you must create a Gym Admin account to access the Fittbot Gym Admin App. This account enables you to manage gym operations, track member activities, monitor equipment usage, and access other administrative features.
Q: Can gym owners access user’s data?
A. Gym owners cannot access all user’s data. They can only view or modify information relevant to their respective gym members.
Q. How secure is my data?
A. Fittbot prioritizes user data security with advanced encryption and strict privacy policies. Your data is securely stored and protected against unauthorized access.
Q. Is my password secure?
A. Yes, Fittbot uses industry-standard encryption protocols to protect user passwords. We recommend setting a strong, unique password and enabling two-factor authentication.
Q. Can someone set up the software for me or is there any video tutorials available?
A. Yes, Fittbot provides step-by-step video tutorials for setup and usage. Additionally, customer support is available for further assistance.

Q. Can I transfer data from previous software?
A. Yes, Fittbot allows you to import data from previous software. Data migration templates will be provided to you. Simply submit your data in the specified format to the Fittbot onboarding team for seamless migration.
Q. Is there a limit to the number of clients I can add?
A. No Limit, Fittbot’s client management system enables users to add multiple clients.
Q: Can I chat with my gym clients? Is there a specific community page available?
A. Yes, Fittbot provides a built-in chat feature that allows gym admins to communicate directly with their clients. Additionally, a Community Page is available where gym members and trainers can engage, share fitness updates, and participate in discussions.

﻿Fittbot Complete Feature Guide
Fittbot App Features
Weight & Progress Tracking
* Weight Progress: Users can set their targeted weight and track their progress over time
* Workout Streak: Monitor continuous workout days and maintain consistency
* Transformation View: Users can view their fitness transformation journey with before/after comparisons
Gym Intelligence & Live Updates
* Gym Live Update: Real-time information showing how many people are present in the gym and which muscle groups are being worked on most
* My Gym Feature: Provides insights about active members in current session and popular muscle groups being trained today
* Gym Crowd Reminders: Kyra AI sends reminders about when the gym is full or has normal capacity
Social & Community Features
* Leader Board: Competitive ranking system among gym members
* Gym Buddy: Connect and workout with other gym members
* Feed Page: Communication platform where users can interact with others in their particular gym
* User Blocking: Privacy control allowing users to block other users
* Gym Announcements: View important announcements from your gym
* Gym Offers: Access special offers and promotions from your gym
Nutrition & Diet Management
* Daily Water Intake: Track water consumption with smart reminders
* Today's Diet Progress: View comprehensive daily diet progress and nutritional intake

* Daily Calories Calculator: Calculate individual daily calorie needs based on personal metrics
* Daily Calories Goal Setting: Set and customize daily calorie targets
* AI Food Scanner: Take a picture and Kyra AI will calculate food calories with macro nutrients breakdown
* AI-Based Diet Templates: Access pre-designed diet plans powered by artificial intelligence
* Custom Diet Templates: Create personalized diet templates with Kyra AI recommendations
* AI-Diet Analysis: Comprehensive diet analysis powered by Kyra AI
* AI-Diet Reports: Detailed dietary reports and insights powered by Kyra AI
Workout & Exercise Management
* Custom Workouts: Users can add their own workout routines
* Pre-defined Workouts: Access to Fittbot's library of pre-designed workout routines
* Workout Template Creation: Create and customize personal workout templates
* AI-Workout Analysis: Advanced workout analysis powered by Kyra AI
* AI-Workout Reports: Detailed workout reports and performance insights powered by Kyra AI
Smart Reminders & Notifications
* Smart Reminders: Automated reminders for diet, workout, gym crowd updates, and general schedules
* Water Intake Reminders: Intelligent hydration reminders throughout the day
* Gym Capacity Alerts: Get notified about optimal gym visiting times
Health & Wellness Dashboard
* Health Dashboard: Comprehensive health overview with personalized tips and insights

* Steps Count Monitor: Track daily steps and walking activity
* Rewards System: Earn rewards that can be used for Fittbot subscription renewal or gym membership renewal
Privacy & Control
* Privacy Control: Complete control over data sharing - users can switch off sharing their data
* User Blocking: Maintain privacy by blocking unwanted users
________________
Fittbot Business Features
Client & Member Management
* Add Client: Easy client onboarding and registration system
* View Total Clients: Dashboard showing complete client database
* Member Management: Comprehensive member information and management system
* Active Members Tracking: Real-time view of active members with member heat-map and peak hours analysis
* Newbies Management: Special tracking and management for new gym members
* Import Existing Database: Seamlessly import existing client databases
Business Operations
* Enquiry Management: Handle follow-ups and prospect management (previously pending enquiries)
* Trainer Management: Manage trainer schedules, assignments, and performance
* Plans & Brochures: Create and manage membership plans and promotional materials
* Invoice Generation: Automated billing and invoice creation system
* Payment Gateway Integration: Secure payment processing for memberships and services
* Ledger Management: Complete financial tracking and accounting
AI-Powered Features

* AI Diet Templates: Create AI-recommended diet templates using GPT or DeepSeek technology
* AI Workout Templates: Generate AI-recommended workout templates using advanced AI
* AI-Based Analysis: Comprehensive business analytics powered by artificial intelligence
* AI-Powered Food Database: Access to extensive AI-curated food and nutrition database
Gym Technology & Innovation
* Smart Live Gym: Real-time gym monitoring and management system
* White-Labeled Mobile Application: Custom-branded mobile app for your gym
* World-Class Tablet: Premium tablet hardware for gym management
* 24/7 Customer Support: Round-the-clock technical and business support
Community & Engagement
* Gym Offers Management: Create and manage special offers and promotions
* Gym Announcements: Broadcast important information to all members
* Gym Community Feed: Social platform for gym member interaction
* Gamification/Leader Board: Competitive elements to increase member engagement
* Custom Rewards System: Create personalized reward programs for members
Business Benefits
* Free Branding: Professional branding services to increase gym occupancy
* Lifetime Free Software: No recurring software licensing fees
* 10% Recurring Royalty Income: Earn 10% recurring income from Fittbot subscribed members
* Increased Gym Occupancy: Proven strategies and tools to boost membership and retention
________________
Key Technologies

* Kyra AI: Advanced artificial intelligence powering workout analysis, diet planning, and food recognition
* Real-time Updates: Live gym capacity and member activity tracking
* Smart Analytics: Data-driven insights for both personal fitness and business management
* Cross-Platform Integration: Seamless experience across mobile apps, tablets, and web platforms
________________
Target Users
Fittbot App
* Fitness enthusiasts
* Gym members
* People tracking weight loss/gain goals
* Health-conscious individuals
* Social fitness community members
Fittbot Business
* Gym owners
* Fitness center managers
* Personal trainers
* Fitness business entrepreneurs
* Health club administrators
